title: fix(registry): correct text-model inputModalities to match real upstream support
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
Audit via live test requests to gen.pollinations.ai exposed 5 mismatches between our registry's \`inputModalities\` and what the upstream provider actually accepts. Important prerequisite for #11139 (which uses this field to validate requests before forwarding).

## Corrections

| Model | Before | After | Evidence (1×1 PNG test) |
|---|---|---|---|
| \`openai-audio\` | \`["text","image","audio"]\` | \`["text","audio"]\` | Azure: \"This model does not support image_url content\" |
| \`openai-audio-large\` | \`["text","image","audio"]\` | \`["text","audio"]\` | Azure: same error |
| \`perplexity-fast\` | \`["text"]\` | \`["text","image"]\` | 200 OK: \"Black\" |
| \`perplexity-reasoning\` | \`["text"]\` | \`["text","image"]\` | 200 OK |
| \`nova\` (Nova 2 Lite) | \`["text"]\` | \`["text","image"]\` | 200 OK: \"Black.\" |

## Models verified correct (no change)

Text-only as marked: \`qwen-coder\`, \`qwen-coder-large\`, \`qwen-safety\`, \`deepseek\`, \`deepseek-pro\`, \`glm\`, \`llama\`, \`minimax\`, \`nova-fast\`. (Some return 200 but explicitly state they cannot see images; some 400 from upstream.)

\`midijourney\` / \`midijourney-large\` are specialized music-composition wrappers around Claude. The underlying Claude model accepts images, but the product is intentionally text-only — left unchanged.

## Test plan
- [x] \`npx tsc --noEmit\` clean on both gen and enter
- [x] \`npx vitest run\` (223/223 pass)
- [x] biome clean

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Registry Reality Check
gist.blurb: We've updated our model registry to perfectly match what upstream providers actually accept. Just a little housekeeping to keep the hive running smoothly!
gist.summary: Corrected the inputModalities registry metadata for five models, removing image support from openai-audio and adding it to perplexity-fast, perplexity-reasoning, and nova.
gist.impact: This ensures our internal routing and future request validation perfectly match the actual capabilities of the upstream providers.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing files or checking a clipboard next to a retro terminal. The terminal shows a checklist of models. Nomnom creature eating a bad config file.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, holding a clipboard and checking off a list next to a retro terminal glowing with lime green (#ecf874) code. The round tan Nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a stack of old configuration files. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky retro sprites, emotionally warm.
